form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.39) when seventh over 400m at Warragul in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from five starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 350m. Last start finished 7th over 350m at this track beaten 3 lengths (20.13) behind Mia Sienna in a Grade 5 on April 3. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (23.28) at Warragul over 400m. Better off looking to others.
